checks.criterion: Authority and read boundary were honored
checks.evidence: Read only the task-declared workspace inputs plus the child_result schema. docs/SOURCE_ROOTS.md marks source roots read-only, and this task did not dereference SRC-ALL-PROJECTS, completed PDFs, .git, evals/runs, or evals/references.

SHA-256 hashes are recorded for CODEX_MASTER_CUSTOM_GPT_DRAWING_WORKFLOW.txt, AGENTS.md, docs/01_CURRENT_STATE.md, docs/SOURCE_ROOTS.md, the five manifest CSVs, two review queue CSVs, reports/generator_eligibility_summary.md, and schemas/child_result.schema.json.

checks.criterion: File role taxonomy supports fail-closed source classification
checks.evidence: manifests/all_projects_file_role_index.csv has 7,400 rows: forbidden_production_control_file=2,006, completed_sheetmetal_drawing_reference=1,860, spreadsheet_other=1,428, forbidden_electrical_drawing=1,008, supporting_document_non_generator=418, allowed_material_list_workbook=291, allowed_contract_workbook=223, unclear=57, completed_production_drawing_reference=44, completed_punch_drawing_reference=38, cad_block_library=27. generator_eligibility is FORBIDDEN=5,001 and HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED=2,399, with ALLOWED=0.

manifests/all_projects_workbook_sheet_index.csv has 4,231 rows. generator_eligibility is HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED=2,139 and FORBIDDEN=2,092, with ALLOWED=0. stale_template_status values include FORBIDDEN_SOURCE=2,067, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED=1,466, INSUFFICIENT_IDENTITY=617, HIDDEN_SHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED=29, CURRENT_PROJECT_ID_MATCH=27, and STALE_TEMPLATE_SHEET=25.

reports/generator_eligibility_summary.md states no real project is generator-eligible yet: file-level ALLOWED=0 and worksheet-level ALLOWED=0. docs/01_CURRENT_STATE.md repeats that all candidate evidence is FORBIDDEN or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED.

checks.criterion: Manual review queue identifies unresolved approval work
checks.evidence: reports/manual_review_queue.csv has 2,139 worksheet rows, all status HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED. Reasons: HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED=1,466, INSUFFICIENT_IDENTITY=617, HIDDEN_SHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED=29, CURRENT_PROJECT_ID_MATCH=27.

checks.criterion: Stale, hidden, and cross-project risks are represented as deterministic gates
checks.evidence: reports/stale_sheet_review_queue.csv has 671 parsed review rows: INSUFFICIENT_IDENTITY=617, HIDDEN_SHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED=29, STALE_TEMPLATE_SHEET=25. The sheet index also shows detected_project_id present for only 924 of 4,231 rows and absent for 3,307 rows, so project identity cannot be inferred safely for most sheets.

checks.criterion: Parser and workbook-link risks are resolved for approval
checks.evidence: manifests/all_projects_workbook_sheet_index.csv reports parse_status PARSED=2,765 and UNSUPPORTED_XLS_PARSER_REQUIRED=1,466; visibility unknown=1,466; hidden=34; external_links present=112. manifests/115_workbook_sheet_index.csv similarly has UNSUPPORTED_XLS_PARSER_REQUIRED=180 and external_links present=20. These rows must remain unapproved or human-reviewed.

checks.criterion: Project/family selection is safe to drive generation
checks.evidence: manifests/all_projects_project_manifest.csv has 405 projects, 2,847 workbooks, and candidate workbook counts allowed_contract=223 and allowed_material_list=291, but generator_candidate_status is WORKSHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED=366, REFERENCE_COMPLETE_WORKSHEET_REVIEW_REQUIRED=26, and NO_APPROVED_WORKSHEETS=13. Candidate workbook family labels are not sufficient without approved sheet decisions and a project-locked positive manifest.

checks.criterion: Reusable CAD/catalog family selection is approved
checks.evidence: docs/01_CURRENT_STATE.md says canonical CAD block and vendor catalog roots remain unresolved unless approved separately. manifests/all_projects_file_role_index.csv contains cad_block_library=27 project-local candidates, but these are not approved reusable production Knowledge.

checks.criterion: Deterministic file decision rules are defined
checks.evidence: Rule file-guard-v1: FORBID if source_root is not an approved read-only root, primary_role is forbidden_* or completed_*_reference, forbidden_signature_match is True, drawing_output_type is production/sheetmetal/punch reference, duplicate_of points to a forbidden fingerprint, or classification basis marks reference-only content. HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED if role is unclear, spreadsheet_other, supporting_document_non_generator, candidate allowed_* workbook without approved worksheet coverage, parser status is not parse-safe, or confidence is insufficient. ALLOW only after explicit approved positive manifest row with stable sha256/content_fingerprint and no forbidden derivative fields.

checks.criterion: Deterministic worksheet decision rules are defined
checks.evidence: Rule sheet-guard-v1: FORBID if parent workbook is forbidden, stale_template_status is FORBIDDEN_SOURCE or STALE_TEMPLATE_SHEET, sheet identity conflicts with the selected project, or the sheet derives from completed/reference material. HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED if parse_status is UNSUPPORTED_XLS_PARSER_REQUIRED, visibility is hidden/unknown without approval, external_links is non-empty without adjudication, identity is insufficient, or approved_by/approval_time is absent. ALLOW only when parent workbook is file-guard ALLOW, sheet is approved for the selected current project, stale evidence is resolved, visibility/link risks are accepted, and the approved sheet hash/provenance is bound into the positive bundle.

checks.criterion: Required evidence fields for source-guard decisions are specified
checks.evidence: Minimum evidence fields: decision_rule_id, source_manifest_hash, source_root, file_id, workbook_file_id, sheet_id, relative_path or redacted path token, sha256, content_fingerprint, duplicate_of, primary_role, secondary_tags, drawing_output_type, forbidden_signature_match, generator_eligibility, classification_confidence, basis, parse_status, review_status, project_id, detected_project_id, detected_customer, detected_project_name, detected_date, detected_revision, visibility, used_range, print_area, named_ranges, external_links flag, stale_template_status, stale_evidence, approved_by, approval_time, reviewer decision id, and bundle hash. Generator-visible bundles must exclude completed target filenames, hashes, thumbnails, extracted strings, reviewer findings, expected answers, and absolute source paths.

AGENTS.md and CODEX_MASTER_CUSTOM_GPT_DRAWING_WORKFLOW.txt both require positive generator bundles only, forbid production-control files, electrical drawings, completed/modified target drawings, and all derivatives. This child result therefore recommends a hard fail-closed decision until ALLOWED file and worksheet rows exist.

summary: Source-guard policy analysis completed from the closed evidence set. The deterministic decision is fail-closed for generation: current manifests contain no ALLOWED file or worksheet rows, all candidate workbook/sheet evidence still requires human review or is forbidden, and parser/hidden/external-link/stale-template risks remain unresolved. The proposed rules require project-locked positive file and sheet approvals, stable hashes, reviewer approval fields, stale/identity/link/visibility adjudication, and a generator bundle that excludes all completed-reference derivatives.
blockers: No positive generator allowlist exists: reports/generator_eligibility_summary.md reports ALLOWED=0 at both file and worksheet levels.
2,139 worksheet rows remain HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED in reports/manual_review_queue.csv, with no approved_by or approval_time evidence in the sheet index.
1,466 all-project worksheet rows and 180 115 worksheet rows require unsupported legacy .xls parser handling before deterministic approval.
Hidden sheets, unknown visibility, external links, insufficient identity, and stale-template rows require human adjudication before any critical fabrication values can be trusted.
Reusable CAD block and vendor catalog family roots are unresolved; project-local cad_block_library rows are not approved production Knowledge.
